name: speckit-pro
description: Skill-backed Spec-Driven Development workflows for Codex, including coaching, setup, Codex subagent installation, autopilot execution, status dashboards, and PR review resolution.

interface.shortDescription: Spec-driven workflows and Codex subagent install support
interface.longDescription: Skill-backed Spec-Driven Development for Codex. Includes a Codex-only install skill for bundled custom subagents plus entrypoints for coaching, setup, autopilot execution, status dashboards, and PR review remediation.
defaultPrompt: Use SpecKit Pro to install the bundled Codex subagents and tell me if I need to restart Codex.
Use SpecKit Pro to coach Spec-Driven Development and explain the next step for my current spec.
Use SpecKit Pro to set up a spec worktree and prepare the workflow for autopilot.
